summary: CSV Bulk Import feature testing on Web Admin Panel - ALL TESTS PASSED (100%). Tested: CSV Import button visibility, modal content (instructions + template button + dropzone), file upload flow, backend API integration, import result display, and location count update after import.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ 'CSV Import' button (FileUp icon + 'CSV Import' text) visible next to 'Nova lokacija' button on Locations page header
✓ BulkImportModal opens correctly with header 'Bulk Import Lokacija' and FileUp icon
✓ Instructions panel visible: 'Kako koristiti CSV import' with blue background and correct instructions text
✓ 'Preuzmi CSV Template' button with Download icon visible in modal - downloads CSV with headers + example row
✓ Drop zone visible with upload icon and 'Prevucite CSV fajl ovdje / ili kliknite za odabir' text
✓ File selection works: dropzone turns green with checkmark icon, filename 'test-import.csv' and file size shown
✓ 'Importuj lokacije' button enables after file selection (was disabled before)
✓ Backend POST /api/admin/locations/bulk-import returns {total: 2, success: 2, failed: 0, errors: []}
✓ Result panel shows 3 stat cards: '2 Ukupno redova', '2 Uspješno', '0 Greške'
✓ Success message '2 lokacija je uspješno importovano!' displayed in green banner
✓ After closing modal, location count updated from 18 to 20 (real-time update via React Query invalidation)
✓ Category name matching works: 'Kafići' and 'Restorani' correctly matched by display name in backend
✓ CSV template downloads file with correct headers: name, category, address, latitude, longitude, phone, description, working_hours, is_premium, service_tags, price_level

success_rate.backend: 100% (bulk-import API: 2/2 rows imported, correct response format)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_ locations via CSV import: TEST_Kafic Tester (Kafići) and TEST_Restoran Tester (Restorani). Total locations now 20.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV Bulk Import fully working at https://gradacac-map.preview.emergentagent.com/api/admin-panel/locations. Location count is 20 (18 existing + 2 test imports from this run). Admin credentials: admin@gradacac.ba / Gradacac2024!. The feature includes: CSV Import button on header, modal with instructions + template download + file drop zone, real-time count update on success.

csv_import_button.location: Locations page header, left of 'Nova lokacija' button

dropzone.idle_text: Prevucite CSV fajl ovdje / ili kliknite za odabir
dropzone.selected_state: Green border + checkmark + filename + file size
